summary: A clip from a Fox News segment labeled SUNDAY NIGHT IN AMERICA W/ TREY GOWDY. It shows a split screen of the host and a man interviewed via video link, identified by caption as a victim's father, alongside personal photographs of a man and a young woman together and of the young woman. Lower-thirds read MAMDANI CALLS TO ABOLISH I.C.E. ONE DAY AFTER MIGRANT MURDER, DEMS PRIORITIZE ILLEGAL MIGRANTS, IGNORE VICTIMS, and CONCERNING PREVALENCE OF MIGRANT CRIME IN AMERICA.

A photo of the young woman appears; lower-third reads CONCERNING PREVALENCE OF MIGRANT CRIME IN AMERICA.
